payload.title: Digital Onboarding Transformation Proposal
payload.objective: Redesign onboarding and approval journeys to improve conversion and operational efficiency.

story.core_message: A lighter, guided onboarding experience reduces drop-off while preserving governance.
story.closing_cta: Approve the discovery and pilot phase.

evidence.title: Current pain points
evidence.point: Existing onboarding requires too many steps and creates avoidable abandonment.

evidence.title: Future-state journey
evidence.point: A guided journey aligns customer intent, verification, and support moments.

evidence.title: Governance design
evidence.point: Operational controls are embedded without exposing the customer to back-office complexity.

evidence.title: Pilot roadmap
evidence.point: A phased rollout de-risks delivery while creating measurable conversion wins.
